hypothesis: Introducing aromatic residues at position 5 and charged residues at position 6 will enhance binding affinity by optimizing electrostatic interactions and hydrophobic packing in the SSTR2 binding pocket.

critic_feedback_used.hypothesis: Structural abnormalities in top candidates suggest the current energy function may not adequately penalize poor geometry, requiring stricter stability constraints and increased sampling.

proposed_changes.rationale: The current ddG threshold may be too lenient, allowing candidates with insufficient stability to pass. Lowering the threshold will prioritize more energetically favorable designs.
The small candidate pool may not adequately sample the sequence space. Increasing the number of candidates will improve chances of finding structurally valid designs.
